name: baobab
description: A graphical directory tree analyzer for the GNOME desktop environment, to keep your disk usage and available space under control.

name: diskfmt
description: A disk formatting utility for linux that is similar to the windows format utility.

name: diskonaut
description: Terminal disk space navigator.

name: dua
description: View disk space usage and delete unwanted data, fast.

name: duf
description: Disk Usage/Free Utility, a better 'df' alternative.

name: etcher
description: Flash OS images to SD cards and USB drives, Balena Etcher.

name: filelight
description: Unofficial. View disk usage information, by KDE.

name: gncdu
description: Implements NCurses Disk Usage(ncdu) with golang.

name: isoimagewriter
description: Write an ISO Image to a USB Disk. This is part of "kdeutils".

name: kdf
description: view Disk Usage. This is part of "kdeutils".

name: kdiskmark
description: A simple open-source disk benchmark tool for Linux distros.

name: liketaskmanager
description: Process/performances monitor, CPU, RAM, Disks and Network.

name: mission-center
description: Monitor your CPU, Memory, Disk, Network and GPU usage.

name: pika-backup
description: Doing backups the easy way. Plugin your USB drive and let the Pika do the rest for you.

name: qdiskinfo
description: QDiskInfo is a frontend for smartctl. It provides a user experience similar to CrystalDiskInfo.

name: squirrel-disk
description: Cross-Platform and Super Fast Disk Usage Analysis Tool.

name: testdisk
description: TestDisk & PhotoRec, tools to recover lost partitions and files.

name: unetbootin
description: Install Linux/BSD distributions to a partition or USB drive.

name: ventoy
description: Tool to create bootable USB drive for ISO/WIM/IMG/VHDx/EFI files.

name: veracrypt
description: VeraCrypt is a free open source disk encryption software.
